[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeFramebuffer](../../TextmodeFramebuffer.md) / dispose

# Method: dispose()

```ts
dispose(): void;
```

Dispose the framebuffer, attached textures, and optional depth renderbuffer.

Call this when a custom framebuffer is no longer needed to release GPU resources early.

## Returns

`void`

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="dispose" encoded-code="--" />

## Overrides

```ts
Disposable.dispose
```
